summary: Action refs not pinned to SHAs (v4, v2 instead of 40-char commits)—violates explicit requirement. Workflow lines 24-35: 4 nearly-identical fixture steps should be refactored into matrix/loop to eliminate duplication. Frozen-lockfile without bun.lock verification. cleanup.ts policy interaction logic (order: maxAge→keepLatestN→maxTotalSize) lacks comments explaining rationale. Workflow references tests/cleanup.test.ts and fixtures that aren't provided—would fail if missing. index.ts main() uncaught promise. No validation that fixture files exist before execution. Artifact key (name::workflowId::timestamp) risks collisions. Script logic is sound but documentation sparse; workflow structure is repetitive and fragile.
